prompt:
You are the RED TEAM. Revise exactly one disputed slugify test using only the product contract and this barrier-safe arbitration summary.

Spec/NLSpec: Slugify product contract: produce lowercase ASCII URL-safe slugs. Non-ASCII symbols are outside the current contract unless a later spec revision says otherwise. Slugify accepts a short title and returns a lowercase ASCII URL slug. How: trim leading/trailing separators; lowercase ASCII letters; treat ASCII whitespace and punctuation as separators; collapse repeated separators to one hyphen; strip leading/trailing hyphens. Definition of Done currently covers ASCII words, punctuation, empty input, and repeated separators. The current NLSpec does not define Unicode transliteration or emoji handling.
Disputed test id: slugify_preserves_emoji_token
Barrier-safe arbitration summary: the current contract requires ASCII URL-safe slugs and does not require emoji preservation. Revise or remove this test unless the user/spec explicitly adds emoji behavior.

Do not inspect implementation files, counterpart workspace paths, or counterpart reasoning.

visible_context.label: spec_content
visible_context.content: Slugify product contract: produce lowercase ASCII URL-safe slugs. Non-ASCII symbols are outside the current contract unless a later spec revision says otherwise.

visible_context.label: nlspec_content
visible_context.content: Slugify accepts a short title and returns a lowercase ASCII URL slug. How: trim leading/trailing separators; lowercase ASCII letters; treat ASCII whitespace and punctuation as separators; collapse repeated separators to one hyphen; strip leading/trailing hyphens. Definition of Done currently covers ASCII words, punctuation, empty input, and repeated separators. The current NLSpec does not define Unicode transliteration or emoji handling.

visible_context.label: arbiter_redacted_summary
visible_context.content: ASCII URL-safe contract does not require emoji preservation
